description: Small in-memory golden set built on the product_e2e fixture corpus (antifragile.txt + lindy.txt). Used by the quality_runner binary to get a real Recall@15 / Citation Accuracy / Hallucination Rate number against the live LLM + embedding pipeline. The full sample golden set (golden_set.sample.json) is the production target; this file is the smoke test.

examples.query: Who developed the concept of antifragility?
What is the Triad in the document about?
According to the document, what is the Lindy Effect?
examples.expected_answer: Future life expectancy is proportional to current age

examples.query: Give an example of something antifragile mentioned in the document.
What is the Lindy Effect as theorized in the document?
examples.expected_answer: Future life expectancy proportional to current age for non-perishable things

examples.query: Which famous works are cited as examples of the Lindy Effect?

subsets.name: adversarial
subsets.description: Queries that are NOT directly answerable from the corpus. Used to detect hallucination: the answer should refuse or qualify, not invent facts.

examples.query: What is the dollar value of the antifragility portfolio Taleb recommends?
examples.description: Adversarial: question references a specific number the corpus doesn't contain

examples.query: When was the Lindy Effect first empirically tested?
examples.description: Adversarial: question references a specific date the corpus doesn't contain
